findings.evidence: `rg` shows lines 50-88 use only `{Γ α : Type*} [Group Γ] [MulAction Γ α]` and `{H K L : Subgroup Γ}`; existing Mathlib orbit quotient API is in `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/Defs.lean`, including related subgroup quotient lemmas at lines 388-395.
findings.fix: Move `mapOfLE`, `mapOfLE_apply`, `mapOfLE_refl`, and `mapOfLE_comp` to Mathlib at the natural `MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient` level, or make the generic helper private/local and expose only `Deck.subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE`.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient.mapOfLE` is a fully generic construction for any `[Group Γ] [MulAction Γ α]`, not deck or universal-cover API.

summary: The deck-specific quotient API is at the expected level, but the PR also exposes generic group-action infrastructure in Tau Ceti instead of Mathlib or a local/private helper.
